description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and a curved detachable magazine. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, with visible iron sights mounted at the front and rear. The rifle features a prominent gas tube above the barrel and a slanted muzzle device at the end. The trigger, magazine release, and safety selector are all visible on the side, with the magazine made of metal or polymer. The overall finish combines polished wood with matte and slightly glossy metal surfaces, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance.
description: A traditional assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, dark metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the muzzle device, front sight, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and all major controls.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the stock, handguard, magazine, and receiver, with some controls and ejection port visible.
